input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.8.3
            TITLE: positioning

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.8.3: Positioning
T.1.8.3 Positioning  
The Firewall must extend sufficiently far upwards and/or rearwards and/or sideways where 
any point on the drivers body less than 100 mm above the bottom of the helmet of the tallest 
driver must not be in direct line of sight with any part given in T.1.8.1 above

final_answer: rule T.1.8.3: Positioning T.1.8.3 Positioning The Firewall must extend sufficiently far upwards and/or rearwards and/or sideways where any point on the drivers body less than 100 mm above the bottom of the helmet of the tallest driver must not be in direct line of sight with any part given in T.1.8.1 above
